description: LeadLoft is an AI-powered sales automation platform that finds and verifies leads, automates email and LinkedIn outreach, and manages deals in a built-in CRM for sales, fundraising, and recruiting.
tagline: Customer and investor acquisition powered by AI
overview: LeadLoft combines AI-driven lead discovery and verification with automated email and LinkedIn outreach, conversation management, and built-in CRM functionality in a single dashboard. It serves sales professionals, entrepreneurs, and recruiters who want to compress time-to-meeting and scale pipeline generation without adding manual prospecting work.
what_is: LeadLoft is an all-in-one sales automation platform that uses AI to handle the prospecting and outreach tasks that traditionally consume large portions of a sales team's day. It finds and verifies leads, drafts and sends personalized emails and LinkedIn messages, and tracks all conversations from a central dashboard. Users report that the platform is significantly faster and more capable than earlier versions, allowing teams to spend more time on closing and less on administrative prospecting work.

LeadLoft is well suited to sales teams pursuing new customers, founders seeking investor meetings, and recruiters building candidate pipelines. Because the platform handles both data sourcing and outreach automation, new users typically book meetings with qualified contacts within their first few weeks. The combination of speed, verification, and multi-channel sequencing makes it effective for anyone who needs to scale outbound activity quickly.

The platform brings together lead qualification, email automation, LinkedIn outreach, AI-powered data enrichment, and deal tracking in a single interface, reducing the need for multiple point solutions. It is not a replacement for enterprise-grade CRMs or large-scale marketing automation platforms, but for teams that want an integrated outbound system without the complexity of assembling separate tools, LeadLoft covers the full cycle from prospecting to pipeline management.
